description:
Public type LocalSigningBackend (lib.rs:61) has no Debug impl. The contained LocalKey enum holds key types from ed25519_dalek/p256/rsa that all implement Debug (with key material redacted). Workspace-consistent precedents: qth2.7 (FileBackend), t2qi.20 (KeyringBackend), um3l.8 (DopplerBackend), y4xz.10 (DesktopKeyringBackend) — all P1 missing-Debug findings on sibling crates.

Fix: derive(Debug) on LocalSigningBackend AND on LocalKey enum. Verify by running cargo expand or a quick sanity test that the Debug output of an Ed25519 SigningKey from ed25519-dalek does not print the secret scalar — last time I checked it printed only 'SigningKey(<redacted>)' but confirm before merging.

Acceptance: dbg!(&backend) compiles and prints something useful that does NOT include private key bytes.
title: LocalSigningBackend lacks #[derive(Debug)]
